nodes.name: Training Strategies
nodes.description: Training utilities from DSB 2017 1st-place solution: hard negative mining, size-aware oversampling, and temperature-based proposal sampling

nodes.name: online_hard_negative_mining
nodes.description: Select indices of highest-scoring negatives for hard negative mining

nodes.name: size_aware_nodule_oversampling
nodes.description: Oversample bounding boxes by nodule diameter to rebalance training distribution toward larger nodules
nodes.type_signature: (bboxes: NDArray[np.float64], diameter_column: int, size_thresholds: NDArray[np.float64] | None = None, repeat_counts: NDArray[np.int64] | None = None) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: softmax_temperature_proposal_sampling
nodes.description: Sample k indices without replacement from temperature-scaled softmax distribution over scores
nodes.type_signature: (scores: NDArray[np.float64], k: int, temperature: float = 1.0, random_state: int | None = None) -> NDArray[np.int64]

nodes.name: ternary_search_threshold
nodes.description: Search for a high-performing classification threshold by repeatedly shrinking a bounded interval
nodes.type_signature: (scores: NDArray[np.float64], labels: NDArray[np.int64], metric_fn: Callable[[NDArray[np.int64], NDArray[np.int64]], float], n_iterations: int = 50) -> float
